name: Stitt House Breakfast Quiche
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Chopped fresh chives (or 1/2 tbsp. dried)
2 cups Grated cheese (mozzarella, swiss, or cheddar)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cube and saute the bacon until cooked through and drained.
- If using ham, cube it and cook similarly.
2. Beat together the first six ingredients in a bowl.
3. Fold in the cheese, cooked bacon or ham, onions, and 2 1/2 English muffins that have been finely chopped or sauteed.
4. Pour the mixture into well-greased ramekins.
5. Bake at 400°F for approximately 20 minutes.
6. Remove from oven and serve in ramekins or turn onto plates with a knife, garnishing with fresh parsley and salsa.
Stitt House Bed & Breakfast Inn Hot Springs, Arkansas
